description_long: This is a large Ferris wheel with a robust steel frame and multiple passenger cabins evenly distributed around its circular rim. The structure is supported by a double-sided truss base, which anchors the wheel securely to a wide, flat platform. The cabins are enclosed and painted in a bright red color, contrasting with the metallic gray of the wheel's frame and support beams. The central hub is industrial in style, featuring exposed spokes radiating outward to connect to the rim. The wheel appears to lack visible decorative lighting or illumination features. The entire structure is set on a dark, circular base, suggesting placement in an open area, likely a park or fairground.
description: A large, steel Ferris wheel with red passenger cabins and a sturdy double-sided truss support, set on a wide platform. The design is industrial and functional, with exposed spokes and no visible lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular face of the Ferris wheel, with all cabins and the central hub clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the wheel and the alignment of the cabins, with the double-sided truss support structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite face of the wheel and the arrangement of cabins.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wheel's depth and the truss support, mirroring view 1.
